revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2023 August 17#Category:Art by country]] closed as no consensus ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:02:47
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Visual arts by country]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{CatAutoTOC}} {{Commons category|Art by country}} {{Hatnote|This category generally for tangible visual art (fine art, craft, folk art, popular art, etc.). For art in a broader sense, see also [[:Category:Arts by country]].}} The [[:en:Visual art|Visual art]]s by country. {{category see also|Arts by country}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:Art by country]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Arts genres by country or nationality]] [[Category:Art| Country]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Works by nationality| Art]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{CatAutoTOC}} {{Commons category|Art by country}} {{Hatnote|This category generally for tangible visual art (fine art, craft, folk art, popular art, etc.). For art in a broader sense, see also [[:Category:Arts by country]].}} The [[:en:Visual art|Visual art]]s by country. {{category see also|Arts by country}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:Art by country]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Arts genres by country or nationality]] [[Category:Art| Country]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Works by nationality| Art]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6767719)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6767719)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{Commons category|Art by country}}
{{Hatnote|This category generally for tangible visual art (fine art, craft, folk art, popular art, etc.). For art in a broader sense, see also [[:Category:Arts by country]].}}
{{category see also|Arts by country}}
{{wikidata link|Q6767719}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:Art by country]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Arts genres by country or nationality]]
[[Category:Art| Country]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Works by nationality| Art]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22556809750|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25474554860|time triggered pipeline]]
